Cipla Ltd

Cipla Summary Chart Analysis Peers Quarters Profit & Loss Balance Sheet Cash Flow Ratios Investors Documents

Cipla Ltd

₹ 1,458 0.15%
03 Jul - close price
cipla.com BSE: 500087 NSE: CIPLA
About

Incorporated in 1935, Cipla Ltd is in the business of manufacturing, developing, and marketing a wide range of branded and generic formulations and APIs[1]

Key Points

Geographical Split FY26:[1]
One India - 45%
North America - 24%
One Africa - 15%
EMEU - 13%
Others - 3%

Website BSE NSE
  • Market Cap ₹ 1,17,800 Cr.
  • Current Price ₹ 1,458
  • High / Low ₹ 1,673 / 1,166
  • Stock P/E 31.0
  • Book Value ₹ 426
  • Dividend Yield 0.89 %
  • ROCE 15.5 %
  • ROE 11.6 %
  • Face Value ₹ 2.00
Edit ratios

Pros

  • Company is almost debt free.
  • Company has been maintaining a healthy dividend payout of 25.7%

Cons

  • The company has delivered a poor sales growth of 8.01% over past five years.
  • Promoter holding has decreased over last 3 years: -4.34%

* The pros and cons are machine generated. Pros / cons are based on a checklist to highlight important points. Please exercise caution and do your own analysis.

* The classifications might have changed from Sep'2022 onwards. The new XBRL format added more details from Sep'22 onwards.

Classifications such as banks and foreign portfolio investors were not available earlier. The sudden changes in FII or DII can be because of these changes.

Click on the line-items to see the names of individual entities.

Documents

Announcements

All
  • Corrigendum To The Intimation Dated 3Rd July, 2026 Regarding 'Transcript Of The 90Th Annual General Meeting'
    1d - Cipla issued corrected transcript of its 90th AGM held on 25 June 2026.
  • Transcript Of The 90Th Annual General Meeting
    2d - Cipla released 90th AGM transcript; FY26 revenue crossed ₹28,000 crore and board recommended ₹30 final dividend.
  • Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Newspaper Publication
    2 Jul - Please find attached newspaper publication regarding opening of special window of lodgement of transfer and dematerialisation of physical shares.
  • Shareholder Meeting / Postal Ballot-Outcome of AGM 25 Jun
  • Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Appointment of Statutory Auditor/s
    25 Jun - Cipla’s 90th AGM approved B S R & Co. LLP as statutory auditors for five years from 25 June 2026.
